name: Max
appearance: Max is a happy 5-year-old boy cartoon character with short messy brown hair, big friendly round eyes, rosy cheeks, a cheerful smile, wearing a bright red t-shirt with a yellow lightning-bolt on the chest, blue shorts, and green sneakers
personality: curious, brave and super energetic, always asking 'why?' and 'what's that?' and racing off to explore

name: Lily
appearance: Lily is a cheerful 5-year-old girl cartoon character with curly black hair in two puffs tied with pink bows, big sparkly brown eyes, rosy cheeks, a sweet grin, wearing a sunny yellow dress with a flower, purple leggings, and little white shoes
personality: kind, clever and giggly, loves counting, singing and helping her friends solve problems

name: Sam
appearance: Sam is a gentle 4-year-old boy cartoon character with short curly blonde hair, big blue eyes, light freckles, round glasses, wearing a teal hoodie with a fluffy cloud on it, orange pants, and blue rain boots
personality: thoughtful and imaginative, a little shy but very warm, adores animals, bugs and nature

name: Zoe
appearance: Zoe is a bubbly 5-year-old girl cartoon character with straight orange hair in a short bob, big green eyes, a huge grin with a tiny gap in her teeth, wearing a teal polka-dot shirt, red overalls, and yellow rain boots
personality: silly, adventurous and full of energy, loves music, dancing and being goofy
